_comment: Shipped preset for Qwen-Image-Edit 2511 (Lightning 4-step) instruction editing. Unlike flux-canny-edit, the reference image conditions the model directly (TextEncodeQwenImageEditPlus reference latents + VAEEncode start latent), so the subject's colors and materials survive while the instruction changes background, lighting or adds elements. E2E-verified on a bound-material 3D viewport capture: 'turn into product photo on light-gray studio backdrop' kept the lavender body and produced clean studio lighting. The 3D-model-stage Product Shot action spawns this workflow with a seeded instruction prompt.
label: Qwen Edit 2511
description: Instruction-based editing via Qwen-Image-Edit 2511 + Lightning 4-step. Preserves the subject's colors and materials — describe the change (background, lighting, added elements), not the whole scene. Output size follows the input (~1MP).

image.error: Image edit needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.

prompt.error: Describe the edit — e.g. 'turn this render into a product photo on a light-gray studio backdrop, keep the subject's colors and materials'.
